entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop [Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br.] studied for agro-morphological traits and Striga resistance

entities.name: STRIGA RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet to resist infestation by the parasitic weed Striga hermonthica

entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that affects pearl millet

entities.name: AGRO-MORPHOLOGICAL CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of evaluating physical and agricultural traits of plant accessions

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to reveal diversity and admixture among tested accessions

entities.name: FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Experiments conducted in the field to evaluate crop traits under specific conditions

entities.name: LONG PANICLES
entities.description: A morphological trait of pearl millet characterized by the length of the panicle

entities.name: HIGH-GRAIN DENSITY
entities.description: A trait referring to the number of grains per unit area of the panicle

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: The trait of reaching maturity or flowering early

entities.name: STABLE YIELDING
entities.description: The ability to maintain consistent yield across different environments

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region from which the pearl millet genetic resources originate

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country where Striga resistance was evaluated in an artificially infested field

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: A country where field trials were conducted

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country where field trials were conducted

entities.name: LOW-INPUT CONDITIONS
entities.description: Field conditions with minimal external inputs like fertilizer

entities.name: FERTILIZED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Field conditions where fertilizer was applied

entities.name: ARTIFICIALLY INFESTED FIELD
entities.description: A field environment intentionally contaminated with Striga hermonthica for testing

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal timing during which field trials were conducted in 2009

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The genetic material of pearl millet from West and Central Africa

entities.name: REFERENCE COLLECTION
entities.description: A curated set of pearl millet accessions established for research

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which established the reference collection

entities.name: GENERATION CHALLENGE PROGRAM
entities.description: An organization that helped establish the pearl millet reference collection

entities.name: ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Specific samples of pearl millet genotypes included in the study

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Local varieties of pearl millet originating from various countries

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Improved varieties of pearl millet

entities.name: LOST ADAPTATION
entities.description: The loss of ability to adapt to a specific environment, potentially causing yield inferiority

entities.name: INBREEDING DEPRESSION
entities.description: Reduced biological fitness in a given population due to inbreeding

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of different characteristics among the tested pearl millet accessions

entities.name: ADMIXTURE
entities.description: The mixing of previously distinct genetic groups among the accessions

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Programs aimed at improving crop varieties using characterization data
